title: Thank you guys for subscribing, this is all new to me obviou..
content: Thank you guys for subscribing, this is all new to me obviously but I’ve got a thing for making videos 😈. Here is a solo jo session, hopefully it pleases you. I’m going to try and post a decent amount of stuff weekly to make it worth y’alls while. 😘

title: I figured I would do a little introductory video before we g..
content:
I figured I would do a little introductory video before we got into anything too sexual. So this is me, I’m 5’7” 165(ish). I have 11 tattoos so far with more on the way. My hair is naturally curly, and my ancestry doesn’t really account for it.

Im looking forward to seeing how this little venture goes and can’t wait for you guys and maybe even gals to go on it with me 🥰.
